text: He's not here. Can I take a message?
Could you tell him that the meeting is at noon?
Could you ask her to call me back?
I'm calling to confirm my booking.
Hello, this is Mark. I'm calling to speak to Paulo. Is he there?
Hi Mark. I'm afraid he's out right now. Can I take a message?
Yes, please. Could you tell him that our dinner is now at eight, not seven?
Of course. Dinner at eight instead of seven. Should he call you back?
Please ask him to text me if the new time doesn't work. My number is five-five-five, two-one-oh-three.
Got it -- five-five-five, two-one-oh-three. I'll give him the message. Take care, Mark!

Hello, this is a message for Pricila Adamo from the Harbour View Hotel. I'm calling about your booking for next Saturday. I'm afraid the room you reserved is no longer available, but we can offer you a lovely room with a sea view instead, at the same price. Could you call us back when you get this message? Our number is 0-2-9-9, double four, six-one. If the line is busy, just leave a message with your name and we will call you back. Thank you, and have a wonderful day.

When I started traveling, the telephone was my biggest fear. I could chat face to face, but on the phone I felt lost. I could not see the person, and everything sounded so fast. So I made a simple rule for myself. Before I dial, I write down two things: why I am calling, and one question I need to ask. If they speak too quickly, I just say, sorry, could you repeat that more slowly? And if nobody answers, I leave a short message and ask them to call me back. The phone is not scary anymore. It is only a voice, waiting to help.

First, the phone rings and Pricila picks it up. Then the caller asks to speak to her husband, who is not there. Next, Pricila offers to take a message for him. After that, she writes down the caller's name and number carefully. Finally, she promises that he will call back later in the day.
He's out. Can I take a message?
Could you tell him that the meeting is at noon?
Could you ask her to call me back?
I'm calling to confirm my booking.
No one answered, so I left a voicemail.
I tried twice, but the line is busy.
